mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT IVAP.AP_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , IVAP.SIGN_STATUS AS PROGRESS_CD -- [단계별] 진행상태 [NH0025] : 작성중:10, 지급요청:20, 확정:50, 반려:40, 지급등록:70 ,GETCOMCODE(IVGH.GATE_CD, 'NH0025', IVAP.SIGN_STATUS, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , IVAP.APP_DOC_NUM , IVAP.APP_DOC_CNT , IVAP.APP_DOC_SIGN_STATUS AS SIGN_STATUS , IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE -- 협력사 대금지급요청일자 ,(CASE WHEN IVAP.PY_AP_REQ_DATE IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_REQ_DATE ELSE IVAP.PY_AP_REQ_DATE END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PY_AP_REQ_DATE -- 내부대금지급일자 , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_CNT , IVHD.CUR , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT AS PY_AMT ,IVAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , IVGH.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , IVPC.PAY_TERMS , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.INV_DATE ,IVHD.PIC_USER_NM AS PIC_USER_NM , IVHD.PIC_USER_ID ,GETUSERINFO(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS PIC_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END AS PAY_USER_ID ,GETUSERINFO(IVPC.GATE_CD, CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END, 'USER_TYPE') AS PAY_USER_TYPE ,GETUSERNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END, #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_USER_NM , CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_HNG_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_HNG_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_HNG_CD END AS ACC_HNG_CD , CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_MOK_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_MOK_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_MOK_CD END AS ACC_MOK_CD , CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_DET_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_DET_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_DET_CD END AS ACC_DET_CD , CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_GWAN_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_GWAN_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_GWAN_CD END ', ' CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_HNG_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_HNG_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_HNG_CD END ', ' CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_MOK_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_MOK_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_MOK_CD END ', ' CASE WHEN IVAP.ACC_DET_CD IS NULL THEN IVPC.ACC_DET_CD ELSE IVAP.ACC_DET_CD END AS ACC_NM , IVAP.AP_AMT ,(IVAP.AP_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AP_DATE ,IVAP.AP_ACCOUT AS AP_ACCOUT , POHD.BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD ,(SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS EXEC_AUTH ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_NUM) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_NUM ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_CNT) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_CNT ,IVAP.AP_REJECT_RMK FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVAP.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND IVAP.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = IVPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS != '10' -- 대금지급요청서 작성중(10)은 제외 AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = (CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN '300' WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN '700' ELSE IVHD.PROGRESS_CD END) AND (IVPC.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR IVHD.PIC_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR IVPC.PR_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND IVHD.INV_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = #{DELIVERY_TYPE}
AND UPPER(IVAP.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVAP.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(IVAP.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND UPPER(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC_USER_ID}) '%'
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC_USER_NM}) '%'
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND UPPER(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC2_USER_ID}) '%'
AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC2_USER_NM}) '%'
AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IN
#{item}
AND UPPER(IVPC.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVPC.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVPC.GATE_CD, IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{sAP_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, (CASE WHEN IVAP.AP_USER_ID IS NULL THEN IVPC.AP_USER_ID ELSE IVAP.AP_USER_ID END), #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{sAP_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.INV_NUM DESC, A.AP_NUM DESC

SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT ,(PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , IVDT.INV_QT AS INV_QT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT , IVDT.VAT_AMT AS VAT_AMT ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE IVDT.INV_QT END) AS PY_ITEM_QT ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN (PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC) ELSE IVDT.ITEM_AMT END) AS PY_ITEM_AMT ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN TRUNC((PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC)/11) ELSE TRUNC(IVDT.ITEM_AMT/11) END) AS PY_ITEM_VAT_AMT FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.SIGN_STATUS , IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , IVAP.AP_DATE , IVAP.CUR , IVAP.AP_REQ_AMT FROM STOCIVAP IVAP WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY IVAP.AP_NUM DESC
